post_halt_resolution.lowered_bar_summary: Phase-2C-PARTIAL-honest: full-feature live-LLM end-to-end is observational-only; HEAD-testable scope substitutes golden-fixture Inspector navigation (golden_clinical_001 / golden_climate_005 / golden_defense_004) for cluster-driven runs; 6-tab Inspector list matches web/app/inspector/[runId]/page.tsx; F5/F7/F10b/F15 deferral to per-feature pack scopes; pin/replay/memory observational-only.
